temporal_description: A close-up, profile shot captures a man in a dimly lit room. He has dark, spiky hair and is wearing a light blue collared shirt. The background consists of out-of-focus horizontal blinds, creating a pattern of light and shadow. In the top left corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The camera remains static, holding the tight focus on the man's face. The audio consists solely of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A high-pitched, sustained melody, reminiscent of a flute or a similar wind instrument, creates a somber and contemplative atmosphere. The music is gentle and mournful, evoking a sense of sadness and introspection without any dialogue or sound effects. The man slowly tilts his head back, his expression shifting to one of contemplation or weariness. He looks upward, his gaze distant and thoughtful.
